reference: My sister is having a routine problem. Whenever she wakes up in the morning, her legs experience a lot of pain. Doctors said her body has a low amount of calcium. We have done complete treatments many times, but they have been useless. Please help us. What should we do?
text: My sister is having a routine problem: whenever she wakes up in the morning, her legs experience a lot of pain. Doctors said her body has a low amount of calcium. We have done complete treatments many times, but they have been useless. Please help us. What should we do?
